closed_world.value: Police department and connected urban criminal network
closed_world.quote: Bodie, was a good cop. He could see the streets like no one could; not unless you grew up in them.

investigator.value: Disgraced police officer investigating corruption involving his ex-partner and ex-wife
investigator.quote: Senior Corporal Bodie, the man reading, brought me through my police training. 15 years later, one by one, he's driving

suspect_architecture.value: Three primary suspects from protagonist's past: Bodie (ex-partner/trainer with secrets), Lucy (cheating ex-wife), and Chief Bale (authority figure with disdain). Each has different relationship dynamics and potential motives.
suspect_architecture.quote: Senior Corporal Bodie, the man reading, brought me through my police training... Bodie, my ex-partner, always had his hands in something

red_herring.value: The Blue Bayou location appears to be deliberate misdirection - presented as both a closed club downtown and a street in 'the deep' with trailer parks and meth houses
red_herring.quote: The Blue Bayou used to be a club downtown, but it's been closed for several years now. There is also a street called Blue Bayou

social_world.value: Police department hierarchy with Internal Affairs board, ranks from Senior Corporal to Chief, old partnerships and loyalties creating power networks and protected secrets
social_world.quote: Sitting there in their pristine uniforms with badges and medals, gold stripes and bars on their collars

media_and_audience.value: Internal Affairs board hearing serves as institutional judgment mechanism, with formal charges being read publicly within the department structure
media_and_audience.quote: an officer from Internal Affairs reads off the charges from my past and present transgressions

investigator_wound.value: Disgraced cop facing career termination, betrayed by his trainer/mentor, abandoned by cheating wife, stripped of status and identity - institutional loyalty destroyed
investigator_wound.quote: 15 years later, one by one, he's driving the nails in my career coffin

_meta.title: ebook m j garrett first chance last chance
